_comment: Studio — three-pane layout: main chat (40%) + visual pane (40%) + sidebar chat (20%). The visual pane is bridged to the main chat and renders ora-visual artifacts from the primary conversation; per plan §2 it is collapsible to 0% but not removable. The sidebar is an independent conversation with its own model slot (bridged to main for context) and resolves to the `local-fast` bucket by default (Open Question 4 resolution, WP-2.2 2026-04-17): fast turnaround for side questions, minimal RAM pressure alongside the breadth model running in main. This is a bucket-level default — concrete model pinning happens via the existing slot-assignment system in the model switcher and can be overridden per session without editing this file. Replaces the prior two-pane studio (main + sidebar) preserved at layouts/legacy/studio.workbench-era.json.
